results.title: QA Automation Engineer
results.description: We're looking for a QA Automation Engineer to join our HIPAA-compliant healthcare platform team. Requires 5+ years of experience in test automation, Selenium, REST API testing, and SQL. This is a hybrid role requiring 3 days per week in our Nashville office.

results.title: Manufacturing QC Inspector
results.description: Quality control inspector for manufacturing floor operations.
